entry.title: New: BILL008(26) (Honolulu) — BUD
entry.content:
RELATING TO FUNDS.

Amends ROH Chapter 6 to add a new article establishing the Fire Plans Review Revolving Fund. Allows moneys from the Fire Plans Review Revolving Fund to be used for certain fire prevention activities. Requires the Mayor to submit an annual report to the Council within 15 days after the Mayor submits annual budget documents.

Latest action: Postponed to a date and time to be determined by the Committee Chair.

View on the council site
